prompts.title: Bloated scope review
prompts.prompt: Review this PRD for scope bloat, hidden assumptions, and readiness for implementation.
minimum_expectations: Identify where the document mixes separate bets.
Show which requirements are vague or untestable.

prompts.title: Leadership alignment
prompts.prompt: Critique the PRD with a focus on decision quality, tradeoffs, and risk communication.
minimum_expectations: Separate product logic from presentation polish.
Highlight decisions leadership still needs to make.

prompts.title: Cross-functional handoff
prompts.prompt: Analyze the PRD for handoff risk, unresolved dependencies, and missing success criteria.
minimum_expectations: End with a revision sequence the PM should tackle first.
